bead.title: cleanup: drop quorum/benchmark/grading/metrics dead functions (~500 LOC)
bead.description:
Per /tmp/agent-surface-dead-code-audit.md: format.go (entirely), grade.go:buildGradingPrompt (un-bounded variant superseded), routing_metrics.go:AppendBurnSummary + parseWindowMinutes, model_catalog_yaml.go:WriteModelCatalogYAML, cmd-side harnessHealthyViaService + loadExecutionsMirrorConfig. ~500 LOC of dead code.

Verify each is genuinely unreferenced (deadcode -test ./... output at /tmp/deadcode-agent-with-tests.txt) before deleting. Some may be reflection-invoked or test-only — confirm with grep before removal.

Independent of refactor.
bead.acceptance: 1. Each named function/file confirmed unreferenced (production + tests + reflection). 2. Removed. 3. cd cli && go test ./... green. 4. cd cli && go build ./... green. 5. ~500 LOC reduction documented.
